zesty-chicken-pasta-salad.name: Zesty Chicken Pasta Salad
instructions: In a bowl, combine pasta, chicken, cucumber, celery, black olives, sliced tomatoes, carrots, and Italian dressing.
Mix well and pour pasta salad into a reusable container. Pack with fruits and veggies for sides.

zucchini-and-leek-amulet-pastry-lezzet.name: Zucchini And Leek Amulet Pastry
instructions: 1. Cut the Yufka into 4 finger thickness strips.
2. Heat the Riviera olive oil in the pan.
3. Add zucchia, fine chopped garlic and grazed water, and sauce for a few minutes.
4. Add and mix dry mint cheese.
6. Release Yufka strips on the countertop.
7. Place a tablespoon from the inner mortar you are prepared and in the tip of the yufka strips.
8. Wrap insects in the form of muska.
9. Stick the egg white with brush on the ends of the Yufka.
10. After all the börek wrapped in the muska shape, heat the sunflower oil in the pan.
11. 11. Shake the dough into the oil with kevgir.
12. Serve the paper towel into the serial tab and after leaking the oil.
